tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or early diabetes. Creatinine is slightly high, indicating possible reduced kidney function. LDL cholesterol is at the upper limit, and HDL is low, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of glycemic control, renal function, and lipid management.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
